## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Flosum and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance reporting, and next steps for blog content creation and optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/iCjVVTjnQtoV357jvPDcjzvRGhT8aXiV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX set up a Looker Studio report for tracking blog performance, including GSC and GA4 data](https://fathom.video/share/iCjVVTjnQtoV357jvPDcjzvRGhT8aXiV?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Flosum's Webflow CMS supports custom CTAs and banners, offering opportunities for content optimization](https://fathom.video/share/iCjVVTjnQtoV357jvPDcjzvRGhT8aXiV?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
  - [GrowthX is working on no-index page cleanup and will provide updates in the coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/iCjVVTjnQtoV357jvPDcjzvRGhT8aXiV?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
  - [Flosum team to review and provide feedback on calibration articles by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/iCjVVTjnQtoV357jvPDcjzvRGhT8aXiV?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)

## Topics

### Performance Reporting Setup

  - [Looker Studio report created to track blog performance](https://fathom.video/share/iCjVVTjnQtoV357jvPDcjzvRGhT8aXiV?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Includes data from Google Search Console and Google Analytics 4](https://fathom.video/share/iCjVVTjnQtoV357jvPDcjzvRGhT8aXiV?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Features filters to isolate GrowthX-created content](https://fathom.video/share/iCjVVTjnQtoV357jvPDcjzvRGhT8aXiV?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Tracks metrics like clicks, impressions, CTR, and LLM referral traffic](https://fathom.video/share/iCjVVTjnQtoV357jvPDcjzvRGhT8aXiV?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Team discussed preference for monthly vs. weekly performance tracking as content matures](https://fathom.video/share/iCjVVTjnQtoV357jvPDcjzvRGhT8aXiV?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)

### Content Creation and Optimization

  - [GrowthX working on 8 new blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/iCjVVTjnQtoV357jvPDcjzvRGhT8aXiV?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [Flosum team to review calibration articles and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/iCjVVTjnQtoV357jvPDcjzvRGhT8aXiV?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Discussion on incorporating custom CTAs and banners in blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/iCjVVTjnQtoV357jvPDcjzvRGhT8aXiV?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [Potential to leverage Clarity heatmap data for optimizing content layout](https://fathom.video/share/iCjVVTjnQtoV357jvPDcjzvRGhT8aXiV?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0)
  - [Consideration for creating competitive comparison content without direct competitor bashing](https://fathom.video/share/iCjVVTjnQtoV357jvPDcjzvRGhT8aXiV?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)

### Technical Access and Permissions

  - [GrowthX team needs proper access to Webflow for blog post creation](https://fathom.video/share/iCjVVTjnQtoV357jvPDcjzvRGhT8aXiV?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
  - [Beau to adjust Webflow permissions to editor-level access (not design access)](https://fathom.video/share/iCjVVTjnQtoV357jvPDcjzvRGhT8aXiV?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)

### Ongoing Projects

  - [Jakub working on no-index page cleanup, expected to be a multi-week project](https://fathom.video/share/iCjVVTjnQtoV357jvPDcjzvRGhT8aXiV?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
  - [Beau developing a tool to track visitors with high intent](https://fathom.video/share/iCjVVTjnQtoV357jvPDcjzvRGhT8aXiV?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Matt to ensure calibration articles are reviewed and feedback provided by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/iCjVVTjnQtoV357jvPDcjzvRGhT8aXiV?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Beau to adjust Webflow permissions for GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/iCjVVTjnQtoV357jvPDcjzvRGhT8aXiV?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)

  - [Team to explore implementation of custom CTAs and banners in blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/iCjVVTjnQtoV357jvPDcjzvRGhT8aXiV?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
